pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 28 creates this directory; used throughout setup and export scripts
export_result.sh line 82 checks for this path; setup_task.sh line 170 creates /home/ga/Desktop
setup_task.sh lines 49-55 define Flask /api/health endpoint; docker-compose.yml lines 134-137 show nginx listening on port 8080 with proxy to api:5000; setup_task.sh line 157 verifies endpoint
task description explicitly states 'Scale the AcmeCorp product API from 1 replica to 3 replicas'; verifier.py line 54 checks if replicas == 3
setup_task.sh line 152 uses 'sudo -u ga docker compose up'; task description line 5 states 'Login: user ga'
task description line 5 states 'password password123' for user ga login
verifier.py line 14 docstring states 'Pass Threshold: 60 points'; verifier.py line 111 checks 'score >= 60 and distinct_hosts > 1'
task.json id field; used in hooks path /workspace/tasks/docker_service_scaling/
task.json version field; consistent task versioning scheme
task.json env_id field; referenced in environment configuration

task.json difficulty field; task requires Docker Compose modification, Nginx load balancer configuration with Docker DNS resolver, understanding Docker service networking and health checks, testing load balancing and failover - moderate complexity
task.json init.timeout_sec field; reasonable for Docker Compose setup, image building, and testing workflow
task.json init.max_steps field; reasonable limit for medium difficulty task with multiple modification and verification steps
task.json init.reward_type field; verifier.py provides single aggregate score and pass/fail verdict at task completion, no intermediate rewards
setup_task.sh lines 62, 66, 101, 112, 135; all versions are real, publicly available Docker images and packages

privileged_info_summary: The docker_service_scaling task requires users to scale a Flask-based API from 1 to 3 replicas using Docker Compose and configure Nginx load balancing. The API endpoint is at http://localhost:8080/api/health (returns JSON with hostname). The target deployment directory is /home/ga/projects/acme-storefront/. Task login credentials are user 'ga' with password 'password123'. Success requires 60+ points from a 100-point rubric including: multiple replicas (20pts), exactly 3 replicas (5pts), load balancing verification via distinct hostnames (25pts), Nginx resolver/upstream configuration (15pts), API health (10pts), failover resilience (15pts), and report delivery (10pts). Timeout is 900 seconds, max 60 steps. The environment is entirely synthetic with Flask app, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Nginx services generated by setup scripts.
